headline: ITG targets $2.67 billion valuation in U.S. IPO
summary: Investing.com -- Digital infrastructure company ITG plans to raise up to $429.3 million through its initial public offering on the Nasdaq, the Hendersonville, Tennessee-based firm said Monday.

raw.headline: ITG targets $2.67 billion valuation in U.S. IPO
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Digital infrastructure company ITG plans to raise up to $429.3 million through its initial public offering on the Nasdaq, the Hendersonville, Tennessee-based firm said Monday.

headline: Nasdaq-100 Onboards 5 New Stocks in AI-Fueled Rebalancing
summary: This morning, the Nasdaq-100 is getting its quarterly rebalance with five firms getting the boot and five taking their place.
